testcase.name: Demoblaze E2E Suite › 1. Home page loads @smoke
Demoblaze E2E Suite › 2. Category filtering @smoke
Demoblaze E2E Suite › 3. Product page details
Demoblaze E2E Suite › 4. Add product to cart @cart

error.message: page.waitForResponse: Timeout 15000ms exceeded while waiting for event "response"

testcase.error:
[chromium] › e2e.spec.js:35:3 › Demoblaze E2E Suite › 4. Add product to cart @cart ───────────────
TimeoutError: page.waitForResponse: Timeout 15000ms exceeded while waiting for event "response"
at ../pages/ProductPage.js:17
15 | 16 | async addToCart() { > 17 | await this.page.waitForResponse(resp => | ^ 18 | resp.url().includes('addtocart') && resp.status() === 200 19 | ); 20 | at ProductPage.addToCart (/workspaces/Playwright-automation-suite/pages/ProductPage.js:17:19) at /workspaces/Playwright-automation-suite/tests/e2e.spec.js:42:19
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/e2e-Demoblaze-E2E-Suite-4-Add-product-to-cart-cart-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/e2e-Demoblaze-E2E-Suite-4-Add-product-to-cart-cart-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/e2e-Demoblaze-E2E-Suite-4-Add-product-to-cart-cart-chromium/error-context.md
attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/e2e-Demoblaze-E2E-Suite-4-Add-product-to-cart-cart-chromium/trace.zip Usage:
npx playwright show-trace ../test-results/e2e-Demoblaze-E2E-Suite-4-Add-product-to-cart-cart-chromium/trace.zip
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
